title: thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. laterepens
intro: Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. laterepens, also known as the forked fern or forked lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. laterepens typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential health benefits and confirm its safety for medicinal use.
